project_type: Next.js 16 App Router static web application (Dev Snippet & Content Hub)
build_system: npm with Next.js 16.2.4 (Turbopack). Node.js installed via mise (node@22). Must run `mise use node@22` or ensure mise shims are active before npm commands.
test_framework: No test framework pre-installed. Will use npm run build + npm run lint as primary verification.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm run lint` to check for ESLint errors. 2. Run `npm run build` to verify full static build with no errors. 3. Check that all routes are statically generated (shown in build output).
setup_instructions: 1. `mise use node@22` (already done, creates mise.toml). 2. `npm install` to install node_modules. 3. `npm run build` to verify baseline.
environment_constraints: Node.js 22 installed via mise. GPG verification disabled (MISE_NODE_VERIFY=0). Full internet access (OPEN_INTERNET mode). No Docker needed for this static site.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md warns: Next.js 16 has breaking changes from training data. params is a Promise (must await). Use App Router only. Tailwind CSS v4 uses CSS-first config (@import 'tailwindcss' in globals.css, @theme inline block). Steering file requires responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes and semantic HTML for all layout sections.
key_patterns: Tailwind v4: config via CSS (@theme inline in globals.css), not tailwind.config.js. PostCSS uses @tailwindcss/postcss plugin. Layout uses Geist font variables. Dark mode via CSS custom properties (--background, --foreground) with @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark). Path alias: @/* maps to ./*. Dynamic routes: params is Promise, must use `await params`. generateStaticParams for static generation.
directory_structure: app/ - App Router pages and layouts. public/ - static assets (SVGs). Root config files: tsconfig.json, next.config.ts, postcss.config.mjs, eslint.config.mjs. Will create: lib/ for data, components/ for shared UI, app/snippets/ for snippet pages.
